resources.string:
Welcome to Secure Tunnel Android Client (v0.0.3).

 This app connects your Android device securely through an encrypted SSL/TLS tunnel to a remote Secure Relay.

 Modes of Operation:

 1. Seamless VPN Mode (Android VPN API):
 Redirects all device-wide TCP/UDP traffic through a virtual network interface (TUN). No application-level setup required. Traffic is securely packed, optionally randomized with padding, and relayed directly.

 2. Localhost HTTP Proxy Mode:
 Starts an in-app HTTP/HTTPS proxy listener bound to Android's localhost (127.0.0.1) on your configured port (default: 19088). You configure your Wi-Fi settings or individual apps (like browsers) to route via 127.0.0.1:19088.

 Secure Handsake Padding:
 To prevent profiling attacks, handshakes are padded with up to 2x your configured amount. Packets over 1024 bytes skip padding to optimize bandwidth.

 Insecure Mode (Default: Engaged):
 Allows connecting through self-signed certificates or test deployment Relays easily without strict hostname/chain checks. Disable for production nodes.
